name: Coin-Flip Recertification Hearing
text:
Whenever a player flips a coin, that coin must be recertified: that player flips it again. You choose which of the two flips is the official one.
Whenever you choose the official flip this way, you may make a 1/1 white Clerk creature token. (Someone has to stamp it.)
flavorText: Win or lose the flip, the hearing always finds in Prim's favor.

extras.parasitic: controls all coin flips at the table
